case_title: OTTO, ANN VS JAMES P. ANTHONY M.D.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,885.00 FILED BY OTTO, ANN AS TO DEFENDANT JAMES P. ANTHONY M.D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OTTO, ANN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JAMES P. ANTHONY M.D. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESPONDNECE FROM THE DEFT, JAMES P. ANTHONY M.D. RE JURISDICTION OF SMALL CLAIMS ON THE MATTER OF THE CASE AND SUPPORTING DOCUMENTS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OTTO, ANN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JAMES P. ANTHONY M.D. $5,885.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,990.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
